items.h: AEW Full Gear date and location announced
items.p: By Jason Powell, ProWrestling.net Editor... The post AEW Full Gear date and location announced appeared first on Pro Wrestling Dot Net.

items.h: Backstage Report On Jack Perry Signing His AEW Contract On Dynamite
items.p: After weeks of speculation, "Jungle" Jack Perry re-signed with AEW. He is an AEW Original and has been with the company for seven years.

items.h: Jim Ross Comments On Ex-WWE Star Sheamus Possibly Coming To AEW, Re-Forming Tag Team
items.p: Jim Ross believes that Sheamus would be a great addition to AEW's roster, especially if he reunites with his former WWE tag team partner.

items.h: AEW Announces Date & Location Of Full Gear 2026
items.p: AEW announces the date and location for Full Gear 2026, revealing the promotion will be returning to the same state they held Double or Nothing 2025

items.h: AEW COLLISION HITS & MISSES (7/11): Hangman returns, Shida retains the TBS Title, Davis vs. Mike Bailey for the National Championship
items.p: To help add context, my “Hits” are ordered from best to worst. This week’s Collision wasn’t built around shocking twists or major surprises. Instead, AEW used the show to strengthen its biggest...

items.h: Additional Details On Decision To Have Kenny Omega Win AEW Title From MJF On Dynamite
items.p: Kenny Omega won the AEW Men's World Championship for the second time when he defeated MJF on AEW "Dynamite: Beach Break".

items.h: AEW Full Gear announced for Phoenix, Arizona on November 14
items.p: Phoenix, Arizona will receive its first-ever AEW PPV this fall when Full Gear heads to the Mortgage Matchup Center. The post AEW Full Gear announced for Phoenix, Arizona on November 14 appeared...

items.h: AEW reveals Full Gear 2026 date and location
items.p: Another piece of AEW’s 2026 pay-per-view schedule has been revealed with the promotion heading west for Full Gear. Full Gear 2026 will be held in Phoenix, Arizona at the Mortgage Matchup Center on...

items.h: Bully Ray Reacts To MJF Losing Out On AEW All In Main Event
items.p: WWE legend Bully Ray has questioned AEW's decision to have MJF drop the world title to Kenny Omega and analyzed the possible reason behind it.

items.h: Former WWE Star Chris Masters Almost Worked With Steven Spielberg
items.p: Ex-WWE star Chris Masters has opened up about how he turned down a potential appearance in a Steven Spielberg film that featured several AEW stars.

items.h: Will Ospreay discusses special AEW All In entrance plans and Wembley Stadium main event
